name.description: Name of the resource, unique within a namespace

namespace.description: Kubernetes namespace the resource belongs to

labels.description: Key-value pairs for organizing and selecting resources

annotations.description: Key-value pairs for storing arbitrary non-identifying metadata

creationTimestamp.description: Timestamp when the resource was created

generation.description: Sequence number representing a specific generation of the resource

resourceVersion.description: Opaque value for optimistic concurrency control
